name: C-7 --validate exits two when the bom is missing the components array per the CycloneDX schema
command: printf '%s' '{"bomFormat":"CycloneDX","specVersion":"1.6"}' > a.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/compliance/aibom.sh" --validate a.json 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -eq 2 ] && grep -q 'components' err.txt && echo rejected 1>&2
